jobs.prompt:
Create an 8 second muted seamless looping instructional fitness video using the uploaded Lat Pulldown start-position still image.

One adult athletic woman performs one complete correct FRONT lat pulldown repetition on the same lat pulldown cable machine.

The first frame must match the uploaded starting position: seated upright with thighs secured under knee pads, feet flat, torso tall with a slight lean back, arms extended overhead holding a wide lat pulldown bar in front of the body, cable vertical, shoulders down away from ears.

Movement sequence: pull the bar smoothly down in FRONT of the face to the upper chest/collarbone while keeping chest lifted, spine neutral, torso stable, elbows driving down and slightly back toward the ribs, wrists neutral, shoulder blades moving down and back. Then control the bar back upward until both arms are extended overhead again, returning to the exact same start position for a seamless loop.

Important safety/form constraints: do not pull behind the neck, do not move the bar behind the head, do not shrug, do not lean far backward, do not swing the torso, do not turn it into a row, do not bounce the weight stack. The bar path must stay in front of the body for the entire rep.

Fixed camera, full body and machine visible, no cuts, no zoom. Preserve the same model, outfit, gym, lighting, camera angle, lat pulldown bar, cable, seat, knee pads, and weight stack throughout. No audio, no text, no logos, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted hands, no distorted limbs, no unsafe posture.
